---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea or enhancement for Kush Secure Protocol"
title: "[FEAT] <Short description of the feature request>"
labels: ["enhancement", "discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature or enhancement is. (e.g. "Add ML-KEM post-quantum exchange key support")

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when KSP does not support quantum-resistant handshakes.")

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the changes to the API, packet layout, or handshake state machine.

## ⚖️ Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, draft specifications, RFC references, or diagrams here.
